Young Asian woman in a white sleeveless top and rimless glasses, inside a warm, dimly lit Japanese izakaya.

She firmly sets the heavy beer mug down on the table, causing foam to spill slightly.
|
She leans forward aggressively, arching her back and lowering her glasses to gaze seductively over the rims.
|
She runs her fingers through her short hair, tilting her head back and biting her lower lip alluringly.
